tool.name: Azure AI Content Safety
tool.description: Content moderation and safety service with configurable severity scoring and on-prem options.
tool.logoNotes: Official Microsoft Azure architecture/service icon from Azure_Public_Service_Icons_V23.
tool.practitionerNote: Useful when teams already run on Azure and need turnkey moderation and safety classifiers, but it is narrower than a full policy/governance control plane.

dataResidency.detail: Data processed/stored in the selected Azure region (22+ regions); on-prem container option.

deployment.detail: Primary SaaS via Azure API; Docker container for on-prem/disconnected.

auditLogging.detail: Azure Monitor / Activity Log cover API calls; no native per-decision content audit log documented.

soc2.detail: In-scope Azure AI service under SOC 2 Type 2.

iso42001.detail: Not confirmed in Microsoft ISO 42001 scope for Content Safety as of 2026-05.

euAiAct.detail: Safety component that helps operators comply; not itself a high-risk AI system.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary Azure SaaS; vendor lock-in to Azure safety APIs.
